title: HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services offered include: rapid HIV testing, rapid Hepatitis C testing, syringe exchange services, distribution of condoms and first aid supplies, and Naloxone distribution. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies; By appointment only. Email (541) 265-0404 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 265-0404 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Dental Care Referrals * AIDS/HIV Physician Referrals * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
